title: June 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}
'''June 10''' is the 161st day of the year (162nd in leap years), with 204 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Brian Lemay]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Carolyn Hennesy]] is born.
*1962 – [[Tzi Ma]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Ben Daniels]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Bill Burr]] is born.
*1968 – [[George Nolfi]] is born.
*[[1989]] – [[Tina Ivlev]] is born.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Insider 150|''Star Wars Insider'' 150]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Kanan 3|''Kanan'' 3]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine]] published in Germany.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge]]'' premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]] with its [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 1|first]] and [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 2|second]] episodes.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Book of Lists]]'' published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars Life Size]]'' published.
